quicksight.dataset.resourcepermission.Ac.Description: The IAM action to grand or revoke permisions on

quicksight.dataset.resourcepermission.Pr.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the principal. This can be one of the following:  + The ARN of an Amazon QuickSight user or group associated with a data source or dataset. (This is common.)+ The ARN of an Amazon QuickSight user, group, or namespace associated with an analysis, dashboard, template, or theme. (This is common.)+ The ARN of an AWS account root: This is an IAM ARN rather than a Amazon QuickSight ARN. Use this option only to share resources (templates) across AWS accounts. (This is less common.)
